source: Training database assembled from the previous Maldives strips data plus a broader worldwide aerodrome/waterway reference. Verify current AIP, NOTAMs, charts, operator route manual, water aerodrome directory, and local procedures before flight.
disclaimer: FOR TRAINING AND STUDY USE ONLY. This is not an operational airport database and must not be used as the sole source for dispatch, flight planning, declared distances, water-area suitability, customs, fuel, or performance decisions.
note_on_seaplanes: Waterways and water aerodromes are listed as training references only. Usable length, direction, surface state, current, tide, swell, obstructions, traffic and dock/pontoon locations vary. No declared distances apply unless published by the relevant authority/operator.

entries.name: Velana International Airport
entries.notes: Main Maldives hub. DHC-6 seaplane operations use the adjacent seaplane terminal/water aerodrome, not the main runway.

operating_notes: Aerodromes and waterways are grouped for LPC/OPC study and route-familiarisation only.
Always verify runway/waterway status, surface, available length, fuel, customs, lighting, rescue/fire category, and local procedures against current official sources.
For water operations, add appropriate margins for wind, swell, tide/current, glassy water, confined areas, traffic and obstacles.
Short strips and confined waterways require aircraft-specific performance calculation using the approved AFM/POH, applicable supplements, current mass, configuration and conditions.
The DHC-6 can be operated in landplane, floatplane and ski configurations, but only when the aircraft, crew and operation are approved for that configuration.
